articles.value: Looking Back at EDHREC Writers' First Precons
articles.excerpt: EDHREC's team of writers reminisce about the anniversary of one of Magic's most important products.

articles.value: The Best Enchantments in Secrets of Strixhaven
articles.excerpt: Secrets of Strixhaven may be all about instants and sorceries and prepared creatures, but that doesn't mean we should ignore the enchantments.
